name: anti-poisoning dry-run reports which flags would fire without recording or blocking
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"alice","reviewer":"alice"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --all-checks --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'would_flag=self-approval' out.txt && grep -q 'recorded=false' out.txt && grep -q 'blocked=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
